title: Dynamic Waters: Realistic Flowing Rivers
body:
## DYNAMIC WATERS (BETA / Experimental)
This project is highly experimental, so expect bugs, unfinished features, and changes in future updates. If you know how to fix anything or improve the system, feel free to contact me directly.


DISCORD SERVER:
https://discord.gg/s6XMKJtEN5

## !!!!Official Download Notice!!!!

Dynamic Waters is officially distributed through this CurseForge page and Modrinth.

You can also download the mod on curseforge here:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-waters

Any other websites claiming to provide downloads for this mod are not authorized by me. Unofficial downloads may be outdated, modified, incompatible, or potentially unsafe.

To ensure you receive the latest and unmodified version of Dynamic Waters, always download the mod from official sources only (CurseForge or Modrinth).

## What is this mod?

DynamicWaters adds dynamic, flowing rivers to Minecraft. Water is no longer static or “fake-looking” in long river shapes - instead, rivers now behave more naturally with visible flow and direction, making the world feel more alive and immersive.

## Why does it exist?

In modern Minecraft versions (1.18+), rivers often feel like long, flat pools with no real movement. Older solutions like the Streams mod existed but are no longer maintained, and large mods like TerraFirmaCraft are too complex if you only want improved water physics. This mod aims to fill that missing gap.

## How does this mod work?

Rivers are carved into the terrain as part of world generation, forming separate features instead of just random water spawns. They shape themselves into natural paths through the landscape based on elevation and terrain generation.

## Important notes (BETA)
This is a beta version of the mod.
The mod will be continuously improved over time, especially in the area of world generation and river behavior.
Known Issues:
Structures may generate floating above rivers in some cases (fixed in 8.0.0)
Compatible Mods:
Nature’s Spirit
Regions Unexplored
Oh The Biomes We’ve Gone
Continents
Create -(no direct interaction, but works fine with the custom rivers)
Tectonic (compatible from version 8.0.0+)

Any biome-adding mod should generally work fine. However, mods that restore or modify vanilla-style rivers may conflict with this mod and break immersion.
